findings.summary: Good overall analysis of complex FPGA+RF mainboard with correct unit parsing, proper bus detection, and comprehensive power domain mapping. Key gaps in RF component role identification and opamp configuration analysis.

correct.description: Component count (465), net count (471), and type classification correct including 38 DNP parts
Unit parsing correct throughout: capacitor farads in proper SI units (e.g. 1e-07 for 100nF), inductor henries correct
Power regulators correctly identified: 5 LDOs (AP2127K-ADJ for 1V8/1V1/2V5, AP7361EA for 3V3, AP2127K for 3V3A) with proper input/output rail mapping
Memory interfaces correctly identified: HyperRAM (S27KS0641) with 13 shared signals to ECP5, W25Q16 SPI flash with 6 signals
I2C bus detection correct: RX_RCVR.SDA/SCL with 2.2k pullups to 3V3RX
RF chain correctly finds 2x RFFC5072 mixers, MAX2831 transceiver, 5 baluns with connection topology
Differential pairs properly detected: USB D+/D- through multiple stages (MCU, PHY, FPGA), IF pairs (IA+/-, QA+/-)
Reset pin analysis thorough: USB3343 RESET has pullup but no filter cap (noted), RFFC5072 RESETs have both pullup and filter cap
Decoupling coverage with correct totals: 3V3TX 37 caps/28uF, 3V3A 12 caps/19.2uF
RF matching networks detected around antenna connections to RFFC5072 mixers

incorrect.description: LMV358 opamp circuits both classified as comparator_or_open_loop but one is likely a Sallen-Key active filter (typical in baseband signal conditioning for SDR)
UART bus analysis reports 66 entries which is far too many - appears to be matching any 2-pin net as UART, including power nets like 3V3RX
TX_MIX_CTRL.SDATA and RX_MIX_CTRL.SDATA detected as I2C SDA but these are RFFC5072 SPI-like control bus data lines
Crystal Y1 (TCXO) detected with no frequency - should parse the value or connected IC to determine frequency
RF chain amplifiers list is empty despite design having baseband amplifier paths and gain stages
Missing regulator input cap flagged for U24 (LDO-ADJ) input rail __unnamed_82 but this is likely connected through the hierarchical sheet

missed.description: No identification of the ECP5 FPGA (U1) as the central hub connecting USB, RF, memory, and debug subsystems
USB3343-CP (U9) is a USB PHY not just a generic IC - its role in USB signal path (FPGA <-> PHY <-> USB connector) should be noted
No JTAG/debug bus detection despite signals like TMS, TCK, TDI, TDO being present for FPGA programming
DAC output path through opamp filter to mixer not traced as a signal chain
HyperRAM interface operating at high speed deserves signal integrity notes (series termination, etc.)

suggestions: Add RFFC5072 serial control bus recognition - SDATA/SCLK/ENX is not I2C
Fix UART bus detection to avoid matching power nets and generic 2-pin connections
Add opamp feedback network tracing to distinguish active filters from comparators
Add JTAG bus detection for TMS/TCK/TDI/TDO signal groups
Identify USB PHY ICs and trace the complete USB signal chain

findings.summary: Radio module analysis has correct unit parsing and reasonable RF component detection but misses key RF signal chain elements. The dual-mixer architecture (2x RFFC5072) is detected but amplifier stages and switch components are not identified.

correct.description: Component count (214), net count (225), type classification correct including 33 DNP parts
Unit parsing correct: LC filter resonant frequencies in GHz range (1.18 GHz, 738 MHz, etc.) are reasonable for wideband RF frontend
LC filter impedances around 35-67 ohms are physically reasonable for RF matching
RF chain correctly identifies 2x RFFC5072 mixers, MAX2831 transceiver, 5 baluns (RF_BALUN, 2x TXIF_BALUN, 2x RXIF_BALUN)
RF matching networks detected with component lists and target IC identification
LMV358 opamp circuits detected (used in baseband signal conditioning)
I2C pullups correctly identified for RX_RCVR SDA/SCL at 2.2k to 3V3TX
Reset pin analysis correct: both RFFC5072 chips share reset with pullup and filter cap

incorrect.description: LMV358 opamp circuits classified as comparator_or_open_loop but these form active filters in the baseband signal conditioning path
RF chain amplifiers list is empty despite the radio module containing gain stages in the signal path
RF chain filters list is empty despite multiple LC filter networks being detected separately in lc_filters
RX_RCVR.SDA/SCL pullup rail shown as 3V3TX but radio.kicad_sch context suggests these should be on the RX power domain
16 single-pin nets reported includes hierarchical connections (AFE_SPI.CS, TX_XCVR.SHDN, etc.) that are connected in the parent sheet - not real issues

missed.description: No identification of the dual-conversion architecture (two mixer stages for wideband coverage)
No PLL loop filter detection for RFFC5072 charge pump outputs (R59/C90/C91/C87 form loop filter)
AFE IC (U11) and its SPI control bus not identified as part of the RF signal chain
Baseband IQ signal paths (TXBB.I+/-, TXBB.Q+/-, RXBB.I+/-, RXBB.Q+/-) not traced as differential pairs or signal chains

suggestions: Cross-reference lc_filters with rf_chains to populate the filters list in rf_chains
Detect PLL loop filter topology (charge pump -> R-C-R-C -> VCO tune input)
Trace IQ baseband differential pairs as part of RF signal chain analysis
Flag single-pin nets from hierarchical labels differently from true unconnected nets

findings.summary: Receiver chain analysis has correct unit parsing and good LC filter detection with plausible GHz-range resonant frequencies. RF chain topology correctly traces balun-to-mixer connections. Main gap is missing amplifier/filter integration into the RF chain.

correct.description: Component count (101), net count (92), type classification correct including 4 DNP parts
LC filter resonant frequencies correct and physically reasonable: 738 MHz to 1.5 GHz range matches wideband receiver frontend
LC filter impedances (35-67 ohms) reasonable for 50-ohm RF system matching
RF chain correctly identifies RFFC5072 (U18) as mixer with 2 baluns (RF_BALUN T1, RXIF_BALUN T2)
RF chain connections correctly traced: T1->U18 via MIX_IN+/-, T2->U18 via MIX_OUT+/-
I2C bus for RX receiver IC (U14) correctly detected with pullups R60/R61 to 3V3RX
Reset pin on RFFC5072 correctly identified with pullup and filter cap
Decoupling coverage for 3V3RX: 19 caps, 11uF total, has_bulk/bypass/high_freq all true
LMV358 opamp circuits detected for baseband conditioning

incorrect.description: RF chain amplifiers list is empty - the RX path should have LNA stages between antenna and mixer
RF matching list is empty for RX path despite LC network components being present around the signal chain
LMV358 opamp classified as comparator_or_open_loop but forms active filter in baseband path
6 single-pin nets reported but include hierarchical connections (RXBB.Q+/-, RXBB.I+/-, etc.) connected in parent sheet

missed.description: No identification of the RX signal flow: antenna -> matching -> LNA -> mixer -> IF balun -> baseband filter -> ADC
PLL loop filter for RFFC5072 not detected
Baseband IQ differential outputs (RXBB.I+/-, RXBB.Q+/-) not traced as signal pairs
U14 receiver IC not identified by type (likely MAX2831 or similar) and its role in the chain not noted

suggestions: Trace the complete RX signal path from connector through matching, amplification, mixing, and baseband
Integrate LC filter detection into RF chain analysis for a unified view
Detect PLL loop filter between charge pump output and VCO tune input
Distinguish hierarchical label single-pin nets from truly unconnected pins
